title: Space-local main-Agent memory lifecycle
prompt: In the canonical main Agent turn, inspect current-Space memory, create a durable preference, update it with the returned revision, and permanently delete it only after explicit user intent and a unique match. Reject Workers and cross-Space access.
commands: pa-cli memory search --query "回复偏好" --status active --capability <ephemeral-main-turn-capability> --json
pa-cli memory create --content "用户偏好简洁直接的中文回复。" --capability <ephemeral-main-turn-capability> --json
pa-cli memory update --id <memory-id> --content "用户偏好简洁、直接且先给结论的中文回复。" --expected-revision <revision> --capability <ephemeral-main-turn-capability> --json

artifacts.label: Memory isolation, heat and forgetting contract
